hooks.command: bash -c 'if printf "%s\n" "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "terraform (apply|destroy)"; then echo "[terraformer] Reminder: always review the plan output before confirming apply/destroy."; fi'
bash -c 'if printf "%s\n" "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE "terraform (apply|destroy)"; then echo "[terraformer] Operation complete. Run: terraform state list to verify current state."; fi'
